pr_text:
## Title: Fix integer type mismatch for remote_port in pnf_sim phy_info

### Summary
The `phy_info` class in the pnf_sim component incorrectly declared `remote_port` as `int`, which is inconsistent with standard network port representation and could lead to integer truncation issues. Network ports are conventionally unsigned 16-bit values (0-65535) per protocol specifications. This change corrects the type mismatch to improve type safety, prevent potential sign-related bugs, and align with the u
